🏁 {% trans "Hunt complete!" %}

{# --- Your team --- #}

{% trans "Your team" %}

{{ team.name }}

{{ progress.total_points }}

{% trans "points" %}

{% for entry in leaderboard %} {% if entry.team_id == team.id %}

{% blocktrans with rank=entry.rank total=leaderboard|length %}Rank #{{ rank }} of {{ total }} teams{% endblocktrans %}

{% endif %} {% endfor %}
{# --- Podium (decorative; the list below is the accessible version) --- #} {% if leaderboard|length >= 2 %}
{% with first=leaderboard.0 second=leaderboard.1 third=leaderboard.2 %} {% if second %}
{{ second.team_name }} {{ second.points }} {% trans "pts" %}
2
{% endif %} {% if first %}
🏆 {{ first.team_name }} {{ first.points }} {% trans "pts" %}
1
{% endif %} {% if third %}
{{ third.team_name }} {{ third.points }} {% trans "pts" %}
3
{% endif %} {% endwith %}
{% endif %} {% if hunt.status != 'finished' %}

{% trans "Other teams are still out hunting — standings update as they play." %}

{% endif %} {% include "crush_lu/cache/_leaderboard.html" with leaderboard=leaderboard highlight_team_id=team.id %} {# Per-station recap #}

{% trans "Your route" %}

{% for sa in team.station_attempts.all %}
{% if sa.completed_at %}✅{% else %}⭕{% endif %} {{ sa.station.order }}. {{ sa.station.name }} {% if not sa.completed_at %} {% trans "(not completed)" %} {% endif %}
{{ sa.points_earned }} {% trans "pts" %}
{% endfor %}
{% trans "Back to event" %}
{% if hunt.status != 'finished' %} {# Teams still playing: keep the standings honest without WebSockets. #} {% endif %} {% endblock %}
